description: Use this API to return the number of array entries required to accommodate the data to be returned by the remaining members of the substation switching device data family. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.1.0. ierr, swdevs = astaswdevcount(sid, flag)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem substations to include. (input; 1 by default).

return_values.name: swdevs
return_values.description: Number of substation switching devices in the subsystem indicated by sid that meet the editing criteria indicated by flag. (output).

error_codes.description: Working case is empty; SWDEVS returned as 0.
Invalid SID value; SWDEVS returned as 0.
Invalid FLAG value; SWDEVS returned as 0.
